markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's AI-driven SEO service for Witness.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Witness.ai's SEO is stalled by a single-person bottleneck, producing surface-level content (3-4 articles/week) and lacking insight into AI search (AEO) trends.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX's end-to-end service delivers 5 high-quality articles/week, using a robust AI workflow for deep research, agentic drafting, and human-in-the-loop fact-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**Outcome:** The service aims to build authority and increase AI search visibility, enabling Witness.ai to compete with large players like Zscaler and Palo Alto.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**Decision:** Witness.ai will move forward. Stephanie will secure internal approval for the locked-in pricing: a $30k 8-week strategy sprint (incl. 10-20 articles) followed by $15k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)

## Topics

### Witness.ai's SEO Challenges

  - [**Bottleneck:** A single person (Dave) manages SEO as a secondary role, limiting output to 3-4 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [**Content Quality:** Current articles are surface-level, lacking the depth and value needed to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [**Process:** Ahrefs → ClearScope → ChatGPT.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Product marketing lacks bandwidth to add depth.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [**Keyword Saturation:** The team has exhausted high-volume keywords and now targets low-tier, low-impact terms.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**AI Search (AEO) Blind Spot:** No insights into AI model search behavior, preventing effective content targeting.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Competitive Pressure:** Rapidly evolving market requires higher content volume to compete with large players (Zscaler, Palo Alto).](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Driven SEO Solution

  - [**End-to-End Service:** Manages the entire content lifecycle: strategy, execution, publishing, and performance monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**Strategy Sprint (8 weeks):**](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
      - [Develops a 3-6 month content roadmap based on competitor analysis and keyword difficulty.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [Publishes 10-20 articles to quickly calibrate the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [Delivers 5 articles/week (new, refreshes, programmatic).](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [Uses "artifacts" (e.g., case studies, product details) to ensure content is deeply integrated with the brand.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**Robust AI Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [**Agentic Research:** Deeply researches topics using artifacts and API calls.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [**Agentic Drafting:** Iteratively refines drafts to meet writing guidelines and address gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [**Human-in-the-Loop Fact-Checking:** Breaks articles into passages for verification against a confidence interval, ensuring accuracy and nuance.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
      - [Monitors visibility in traditional and AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
      - [Connects content performance to KPIs (traffic, conversions) via weekly reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

### Pricing & Path Forward

  - [**Pricing:** The previously discussed pricing is locked in:](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
      - [**Strategy Sprint:** $30,000 for 8 weeks (includes 10-20 articles).](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
      - [**Ongoing Service:** $15,000 per month.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [**Decision:** Stephanie has final decision authority and will secure internal approval.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Building the workflow internally is too slow and resource-intensive, making GrowthX the faster, more efficient path to market.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler (GrowthX):** Provide Stephanie with a blurb justifying the investment for internal approval.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [**Stephanie (Witness.ai):** Secure CEO and CFO approval using the provided justification.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [**Witness.ai:** Confirm the path forward to reserve the earliest possible kickoff date.](https://fathom.video/share/2zUzEKFrEwe4MpCLmugVNSTmqaQk3VeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
